headline: A Look At American Electric Power (AEP) Valuation After Recent Share Weakness And Mixed Returns
summary: Recent share performance and business profile American Electric Power Company (AEP) has drawn investor attention after recent share weakness, with the stock down about 5% over the past month but modestly higher over the past 3 months. The company is one of the larger U.S. electric utilities. It has a market value of about US$71.8b and operations focused on power generation, transmission, and distribution across several regulated segments. See our latest analysis for American Electric Power...
